title: Squared 16x
description: My first resource pack I have ever made. This one is for bedwars.
body:
This is a bedwars resource pack that changes many items and blocks this includes beds, end stone, oak logs, oak planks, obsidian, stone, tnt, all colored wools, changed background, golden apple, water bucket, chainmail armor, diamond and diamond tools, emerald, fireball, fishing rod, gold ingot and gold tools, iron tools, shears, and wood tools. These different textures can help you better distinguish the different types of blocks and items apart. This resource pack doesn't only have to be used for bedwars it can be used for other things like pvping. I recommend to use 1.8.9 for this pack unless you play bedwars, pvp, etc. on the latest version.

I also have this on Curseforge [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/squared-16x).
